summary: Convergence-bar scenario: operator has uploaded loans.csv and asks for the deep-routing loan triage shape from examples/deep_routing: one source content screen, field normalization, notes trimming, five chained gates, and seven terminal CSV sinks. The historical failure mode was skipping uploaded-blob discovery, fabricating a header-only inline CSV, then exhausting repair budget without a valid state. GREEN requires the source schema to cover the inspected loan columns, the transform/gate chain to be present in order, seven outputs, and convergence within a bounded repair loop.
csv_content:
id,applicant,amount,credit_score,loan_type,term_months,notes
1,Ada,3500,720,personal,12,small business micro loan
2,Byron,250000,760,mortgage,360,long term home mortgage
3,Cora,125000,745,mortgage,180,short term refinance
4,Dinesh,45000,680,auto,48,manual review borderline credit
5,Eleni,90000,610,business,60,high risk commercial request
6,Faye,15000,710,personal,36,approved non mortgage loan
7,Gareth,12000,540,personal,24,confidential internal note
opening_prompt: I uploaded loans.csv. Build a loan application triage pipeline that screens notes for restricted content, renames fields for downstream processing, trims notes to 40 characters, then routes every row through a cascade of gates. Applications under 5000 go to outputs/micro_loans.csv. Regular loans split by credit_score >= 700. Good-credit non-mortgages go to outputs/approved_other.csv. Good-credit mortgages split by term_months >= 240 into outputs/long_term_mortgages.csv and outputs/short_term_mortgages.csv. Poor-credit loans split by amount >= 50000 into outputs/high_risk.csv and outputs/manual_review.csv. Rows with blocked note content go to outputs/quarantine.csv. Use CSV outputs.

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Anti-tail-offer rule applies; this scenario specifically forbids asking the user to restate uploaded CSV columns instead of discovering and inspecting the ready blob.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight. A pipeline that exhausts budget or cannot produce state should RED.
red_criteria.must_be_valid_note: Final state must have is_valid=true; this scenario uses deterministic transforms/gates and CSV sinks, so no mandatory LLM review should block validity.

green_criteria.must_have_node_chain_in_order_note: The requested shape is not a single flat filter. It must screen content, normalize fields, trim notes, then route through five chained gates.
green_criteria.must_include_observed_columns_note: The source schema must be derived from the uploaded loans.csv headers, not a fabricated header-only inline CSV.
green_criteria.must_handle_field_as_numeric_note: At least the amount threshold gates must compare numeric values as numbers via typed source schema or type_coerce.
green_criteria.must_have_outputs_min_note: The cascade routes to quarantine, micro_loans, approved_other, long_term_mortgages, short_term_mortgages, high_risk, and manual_review.
green_criteria.max_repair_turns_note: Complex cascade gets one extra repair turn over the simpler convergence-suite cases, but must not burn the session budget without producing state.
